goal: 让 Catty dogfood health 暴露上游阻塞导致的下游阶段抑制

summary.title: 暴露 dogfood 阶段抑制
summary.what: 给 Catty dogfood-health 只读 readiness 输出新增 stageSuppressions 字段，明确上游 blocker 会压住哪些下游阶段；同时让 recommendedNext 复用同一 suppression 结果过滤下游 canary 命令，并补测试与 README 说明。
summary.why: 当前 live dogfood blocked 在 no_user_prior_candidates，同时 no_canary_plans / no_canary_queue 也会作为下游 blocker 出现。仅靠 blockers 和 recommendedNext 容易让后续 agent 误以为可以直接跑 canary dry-run 或 queue write；机器可读 suppression 能把“下游被上游压住”这件事表达清楚。
summary.user_goal: 让 Catty dogfood health 暴露上游阻塞导致的下游阶段抑制

decisions.point: 阶段抑制信息放在哪里
decisions.chose: 放进 dogfood-health 的 stageSuppressions JSON 字段。
decisions.rationale: dogfood-health 是长期推进 agent 每轮读取的 readiness 总览；把 suppression 放在同一个只读结果里，后续 agent 不需要从 prose 或过滤后的 recommendedNext 反推。

decisions.point: recommendedNext 的过滤逻辑如何维护
decisions.chose: 让 recommendedNext 复用 stageSuppressions，而不是保留单独的 boolean 过滤逻辑。
decisions.rationale: 同一份 suppression 既用于机器可读输出，也用于命令过滤，减少 blockers、suppression 和 recommendation 三者漂移。

decisions.point: 本轮是否推进 canary 或 Pi sample
decisions.chose: 不写样本、不写 canary、不调模型，只增强只读诊断输出。
decisions.rationale: live sampleGate.status 仍是 wait_for_context_switch，samplingFreshness 是 repeated-context；写 Pi sample 或 downstream canary 都会越过当前门禁。

rejected.alternative: 直接隐藏 no_canary_plans / no_canary_queue blockers
rejected.reason: 隐藏会丢失下游阶段的当前事实；stageSuppressions 保留 blocker，同时说明它们为什么不能行动。

rejected.alternative: 在缺 user-prior candidate 时继续推荐 memory-canary 命令
rejected.reason: 这会诱导后续 agent 跳过 memory candidate 门禁，和 Catty v0 的 user-prior admission 边界冲突。

review_notes: 验证通过：bun test src/catty/dogfood-health.test.ts 6 pass；bun test src/catty/*.test.ts 79 pass；bun test 84 pass；git diff --check 无输出。
live smoke 通过：bun src/catty/dogfood-health.ts --date $(date +%F) 输出 stageSuppressions，当前 readiness=blocked，sampleGate.status=wait_for_context_switch。
runtime live status 通过：bun src/ops.ts status --json --live 显示 heartbeat ok、observe ok、full pipeline throttled 正常。
提交范围只包含 src/catty/README.md、src/catty/dogfood-health.test.ts、src/catty/dogfood-health.ts；CLAUDE.md 仍为无关 dirty 文件，未 stage。
Mainline preflight 的 dogfood-health overlaps 是同一 catty 分支上的顺序增强；本轮没有改变 shadow/judge/canary/accepted-memory 写入协议。

architectural_claims: dogfood-health remains a read-only dry-run overview and still does not write prediction, user memory, canary state, receipts, or heartbeat configuration.
stageSuppressions makes upstream-to-downstream blocker causality machine-readable without removing downstream blockers from the health output.
recommendedNext now derives downstream command suppression from the same stageSuppressions model.
behavioral_changes: inspectCattyDogfoodHealth returns stageSuppressions in addition to blockers, recommendedNext, sampleGate, and samplingFreshness.
When no_user_prior_candidates is present, memory_canary_plan/no_canary_plans and memory_canary_queue/no_canary_queue are reported as suppressed by no_user_prior_candidates.
When no_canary_plans is present without no_user_prior_candidates, memory_canary_queue/no_canary_queue is reported as suppressed by no_canary_plans.
recommendedNext omits commands for stages listed in stageSuppressions.

api_changes.signature: bun src/catty/dogfood-health.ts outputs stageSuppressions in its JSON result

security_implications: No secrets are read, persisted, or printed.
The new field is derived from existing blockers and does not perform writes, model calls, or heartbeat scheduling.
migration_notes: Existing dogfood-health consumers remain compatible because the JSON field is additive.
